events.title: US and Iran Announce Ceasefire Agreement
events.desc: US President Donald Trump announced a ceasefire agreement with Iran, with plans for a memorandum of understanding to be signed on Friday. This announcement aims to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US-Iran Peace Deal Framework Agreed Upon
events.desc: An agreement on a framework for a peace deal between the United States and Iran has been reached, potentially leading to the extrication of the US from the war and easing global energy prices. The deal includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Israel Attacks Hezbollah Targets in Beirut
events.desc: Israel stated its military attacked Hezbollah targets in southern Beirut's suburbs following Hezbollah's firing of projectiles into Israeli territory. The Lebanese state news agency reported two fatalities from the strikes.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Southern Lebanon Kill 17
events.desc: Reports indicate that Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon have resulted in the deaths of 17 individuals, with nine fatalities occurring in the town of Tayr Debba. This follows earlier exchanges of fire.

events.title: Three Indian Sailors Killed in US Strike on Oil Tanker
events.desc: The US military struck a Palau-flagged oil tanker, resulting in the deaths of three Indian sailors. The strike occurred after the tanker allegedly failed to comply with directions from US forces.

events.title: Global Leaders React to US-Iran Peace Agreement Announcement
events.desc: Leaders from Britain, France, Germany, and Italy have issued a joint statement expressing readiness to work with the US, Iran, and the IAEA on nuclear non-proliferation, following the announcement of a US-Iran deal to end the war. They emphasize Iran must never acquire nuclear weapons.

events.title: UK, France, Germany, Italy Ready to Lift Iran Sanctions Post-Deal
events.desc: The E4 nations (UK, France, Germany, Italy) have stated their preparedness to lift sanctions on Iran, contingent on steps taken regarding its nuclear program, following the US-Iran war-ending deal. They reiterated that Iran must not acquire nuclear weapons.

events.title: Pakistan PM: US and Iran Reach Peace Deal
events.desc: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced that the United States and Iran have reached a peace deal, declaring an immediate and permanent termination of military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon. A signing ceremony is planned for June 19 in Switzerland.

events.title: Israel Attacks Hezbollah Targets in Beirut's Southern Suburbs
events.desc: The Israeli military conducted strikes on Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburbs, responding to Hezbollah launching projectiles into northern Israel. The Lebanese state news agency reported two deaths.

events.title: One Dead, Five Injured in Shooting Incident in Israel
events.desc: A shooting incident occurred where the suspect opened fire from a vehicle across multiple locations before being shot dead by authorities. One person was killed and five others were injured.

events.title: Funeral Held for Infant Killed by Israeli Troops
events.desc: A funeral was conducted for a seven-month-old infant who was fatally shot by Israeli troops in the occupied West Bank. The infant was carried to the graveyard wrapped in a Palestinian flag.

events.title: Iran's World Cup Team Lands in Mexico Amid US Visa Row
events.desc: Iran's national football team arrived in Mexico to prepare for the World Cup, with ongoing tensions due to a US visa dispute affecting some support staff. Their matches are scheduled in the US, necessitating travel on match days.

events.title: Russian Grain Smuggling to Libya Tracked Using New Technique
events.desc: A new technique utilizing vessel tracking data has helped identify the expansion of Russian grain smuggling operations to Libya, with a specific bulk carrier identified loading grain from occupied Ukrainian territory before docking in Benghazi.

events.title: Banned Russian Submunitions Found in Mali
events.desc: Unexploded Russian-made cluster munition bomblets have been discovered in northern Mali, despite the country being a signatory to the Convention on Cluster Munitions. This discovery follows announcements of airstrikes by the Malian military.

events.title: Tracking Efforts to Destroy Iran's Police Infrastructure
events.desc: In the initial three weeks of the US and Israeli war against Iran, at least 80 police stations and related infrastructure have been damaged or destroyed. Experts suggest this campaign aims to degrade the Iranian regime's repressive capacity.
